---
title: "心律不整 — Arrhythmia"
---

## 教學講義 Handouts

- [CLOSURE-AF 心房顫動左心耳封堵術 教學講義.md](CLOSURE-AF 心房顫動左心耳封堵術 教學講義.md)

## LaTeX Files

- EHJ STAR Study PSGB Electrical Storm 2024 教學講義.tex
- European Heart Journal BEAT PAROX-AF PFA vs RFA 2025 Afib EP.tex
- JACC EQUAL Trial Smartwatch AF 2026 教學講義.tex
- NEJM OCEAN Trial AF Ablation Anticoagulation 2026.tex
